creator: tolid@tolid.eu.org
text:
mantainer's new email, graphics/p5-Image-Size

Fix: 

-MAINTAINER=    tolid@plab.ku.dk
+MAINTAINER=    tolid@tolid.eu.org
 COMMENT=       Perl5 module to determine the size of images in
several common formats

 RUN_DEPENDS=   p5-Compress-Zlib>=2:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/p5-Compress-Zlib--Frx1BzQHkNEUbMf6fjpnhtdKsP67Fa2RtDvWX4e6BgAp5x70
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN p5-Image-Size.bak/Makefile p5-Image-Size/Makefile
--- p5-Image-Size.bak/Makefile  2008-11-16 10:36:21.000000000 +0100
+++ p5-Image-Size/Makefile      2008-11-16 20:33:41.000000000 +0100
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=  CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= p5-
